song.title: Christ Liveth in Me
song.author: James McGranahan
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D G D Once far from God and dead in sin, . G D No light my heart could see. .G D D7 G Em But in God’s Word the light I found; . D A D Now Christ liveth in me.
[C] . A Christ liveth in me. .Bm F#7 Christ liveth in me. .G D Bm Oh! What a salvation this, .G D A D That Christ liveth in me.
[V2] As rays of light from yonder sun, The flow’rs of earth set free, So life and light and love come forth From Christ living in me.
[V3] As lives the flow’r within the seed, As in the cone the tree, So, praise the Christ of truth and grace. His Spirit dwelleth in me.
[V4] With longing all my heart is filled, That like Him I may be. As on the wondrous thought I dwell, That Christ liveth in me.
